reasoning: By mid-October 2025, market participants would have access to real-time daily temperature reanalysis data (like ERA-5) for the first half of the month, as well as weather forecasts for the remainder. The fact that the market price for this contract is 0.01 (1%) on October 16 indicates that observed temperatures are running well above the 1.10ºC threshold, leaving virtually no chance for the final monthly average to fall below it. Given the system's lower bound of 0.02, I am predicting 2%.
